_doc: Fall time at V_LOW%-V_HIGH% of the auto-detected envelope of the full (unclipped) waveform. Reversed-threshold convention as fall_time_auto. Same shape but without the t_1..t_2 window.
name: fall_time_auto_full
expression: average(riseTime(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG") ymin(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG")) nil ymax(vtime('$ANALYSIS "$SIG")) nil $V_LOW $V_HIGH t "time"))
